title: position: sticky
description: An element with position: sticky scrolls normally until it reaches an offset threshold — defined by top, left, bottom, or right — then sticks in place until its container scrolls away.
html:
Sticky Navigation

Scroll down inside this box — the nav stays pinned to the top.

challenge: Scroll the preview — the nav disappears. Make it stick to the top of the scrollable container as the content scrolls beneath it. You'll need both position and top.
realWorldUsage: Sticky table headers in data-heavy dashboards, section navigation that stays visible as users scroll through long articles, and in-panel toolbars that should remain accessible while the panel content scrolls — any UI where a key element should stay visible without pulling it out of the document flow.
